dict.string: Assuming 'Size' is not equal to iInvalid
Assuming 'ElementSize' is not equal to iInvalid
Value stored to 'ptr' is never read
Value stored to 'ptr' is never read
Right shift by '64' overflows the capacity of 'unsigned long long'
The result of right shift is undefined because the right operand '64' is not smaller than 64, the capacity of 'unsigned long long'
Right operand is negative in right shift
The result of right shift is undefined because the right operand is negative
Left shift overflows the capacity of 'unsigned long long'
Assuming right operand of bit shift is less than 64
The result of left shift is undefined because the right operand is not smaller than 64, the capacity of 'unsigned long long'
